name: miles-canvas-area-refresh
description: Refreshes the Slack Canvas for each business area with the current state of REQ tickets. Runs hourly via schedule, or on-demand when called as a sub-workflow by miles-conversation-handler or miles-approval-handler after a new REQ is created. Fetches active REQ tickets per area from Jira (project=REQ, statusCategory!=Done, not DEPRECATED), resolves AM story dates for tech-status tickets, fetches closed tickets from the last 30 days, and builds a Markdown table with 3 sections: totals summary, active REQs (with status labels, days in status, blocked reason), and recently closed REQs (with resolution time). Replaces each area's Slack Canvas content via canvases.edit API.
